series_metadata.series_description: To provide a record of evidence and recovered property collected, including its chain of custody, and to provide a method for requesting laboratory examination of the property (OHP 0161/HP-28, Property Control Form). To provide a means to review each lab case for technical accuracy (OHP 0079, Technical Review Checklist). To provide a means to record testing of controlled substances by lab personnel (OHP 0084, Controlled Substance Worksheet).

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: HP-28s that are part of other reports such as OH-1s and case investigations assume the retention period of those reports. HP-28s that are part of a death investigation are retained permanently. Copies of all referenced reports are retained by the laboratory for nine (9) years plus current, then destroyed. ; Paper: HP-28s that are part of other reports such as OH-1s and case investigations assume the retention period of those reports. HP-28s that are part of a death investigation are retained permanently. Copies of all referenced reports are retained by the laboratory for nine (9) years plus current, then destroyed., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
